scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field0];user=phone SIP/2.0 Max-Forwards: 68 Session-Expires: 1800;refresher=uas Supported: timer, 100rel To: <sip:[field1]@[field0];user=phone> From: "Cisco Advanced 1" <sip:[field2]@[field0]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] P-Asserted-Identity:"Cisco Advanced 1"<sip:[field2]@[field0]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Allow: INVITE, BYE, OPTIONS, CANCEL, ACK, REGISTER, NOTIFY, INFO, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, PRACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Contact: <sip:[field2]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 60 Call-Info: <https://10.92.222.12:443/ccmp/ccmpServlet?mmcs=AS1>;Purpose=ccmp,<sip:633866@10.95.163.105:5060;transport=tcp>;gsid=b33e9ad0-4a5c-11e6-a602-005056866bc1;Purpose=isfocus,<>;Purpose=application Allow-Events: presence Content-Length: [len] Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=user1 53655765 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] c=IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 m=audio 8000 RTP/AVP 18 0 120 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000/1 a=fmtp:8 vad=no a=fmtp:0 vad=no

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@[field0];user=phone SIP/2.0 Max-Forwards: 69 Session-Expires: 1800;refresher=uas Supported: timer, 100rel [routes] [last_To:] [last_From:] P-Asserted-Identity:"Cisco Advanced 1"<sip:6923240@10.16.193.3> [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 2 INVITE Allow: INVITE, BYE, OPTIONS, CANCEL, ACK, REGISTER, NOTIFY, INFO, REFER, SUBSCRIBE, PRACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Contact: <sip:[field2]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 60 Call-Info: <sip:10.16.194.2>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow-Events: presence Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
